---
title: "Nhanes 2011-2012 Hypertension Analysis"
author: "Tauras Lu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/Users/tauras/Documents/Code/nhanes_sql")

library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(survey)
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
 

data <- read.csv("output/analysis_dataset.csv")

head(data)

glimpse(data)
summary(data)


```

```{r}
qc <- data %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    dup_seqn = n() - n_distinct(SEQN),
    missing_bmi = sum(is.na(bmi)),
    missing_sbp = sum(is.na(sbp_mean)),
    missing_wt = sum(is.na(WTMEC2YR)),
    bmi_out_of_range = sum(bmi < 10 | bmi > 80, na.rm = TRUE),
    sbp_out_of_range = sum(sbp_mean < 70 | sbp_mean > 250, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sbp_lt2 = sum(n_sbp < 2, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

qc

```

```{r}
df <- data %>%
  filter(
    age >= 20,
    !is.na(WTMEC2YR), !is.na(SDMVPSU), !is.na(SDMVSTRA),
    !is.na(bmi), !is.na(sbp_mean), !is.na(dbp_mean),
    n_sbp >= 2,
    between(bmi, 10, 80),
    between(sbp_mean, 70, 250)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c(1,2), labels = c("Male","Female")),
    bp_med2 = ifelse(is.na(bp_med), 0, bp_med), 
    htn = as.integer((sbp_mean >= 140) | (dbp_mean >= 90) | (bp_med2 == 1))
  )

head(df)

table(df$htn, useNA = "ifany")




```

```{r}
des <- svydesign(
  ids = ~SDMVPSU,
  strata = ~SDMVSTRA,
  weights = ~WTMEC2YR,
  nest = TRUE,
  data = df
)
```



```{r}
#Survey-Weighted

#overall
svymean(~bmi + sbp_mean + dbp_mean, des, na.rm = T)

#by sex
svyby(~bmi + sbp_mean + dbp_mean,
      ~sex,
      des,
      svymean,
      na.rm = TRUE)

#hypertension prevalence
svymean(~htn, des)
```

```{r}
model_lin <- svyglm(
  sbp_mean ~ bmi + age + sex + smoker + diabetes,
  design = des
)

summary(model_lin)

```

```{r}
model_log <- svyglm(
  htn ~ bmi + age + sex + smoker + diabetes,
  design = des,
  family = quasibinomial()
)

summary(model_log)

exp(coef(model_log))  # OR



```

```{r}
reg_table <- tbl_regression(
  model_log,
  exponentiate = TRUE
) %>%
  bold_p(t = 0.05)

gtsave(
  as_gt(reg_table),
  "output/regression_table.png"

)
```


```{r}
coef_df <- as.data.frame(summary(model_log)$coefficients)

ci <- confint(model_log)

plot_df <- coef_df %>%
  mutate(
    term = rownames(coef_df),
    OR = exp(Estimate),
    lower = exp(ci[,1]),
    upper = exp(ci[,2])
  ) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  select(term, OR, lower, upper)

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(term = recode(term,
                       "bmi" = "BMI",
                       "age" = "Age",
                       "sexFemale" = "Female (vs Male)",
                       "smoker" = "Smoker",
                       "diabetes" = "Diabetes"))

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = OR, y = reorder(term, OR))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Odds Ratio (log scale)",
    y = "",
    title = "Survey-weighted Logistic Regression for Hypertension"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

ggsave(
  "output/forest_plot_htn.png",
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```
